title: 把产品网页变成可发布的推广素材
subtitle: Capture the real product page, add narration, and render channel-ready creative.
narration: 把产品网页变成可发布的推广素材。ENHE 推广管理器捕获真实产品界面，生成中英文标题、文案、标签和视频脚本，再用本地配音、AI 场景和品牌视觉，输出适合不同平台的素材。所有素材留在本机，生成后即可检查、修改和发布。
scenePrompt: premium commercial product photography for a bilingual promotion manager, laptop dashboard and smartphone mockup on a warm studio desk, soft daylight, teal and coral brand accents, clean editorial composition, no readable text, no watermark
